MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion To Vacate Dismissal Under Ccp 664.6 & Enter Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation; Declaration Of Angela A. Velen
Off Calendar Nov-24-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A.'s Motion To Vacate Dismissal Under CCP 664.6 & Enter Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Motion granted. No opposition filed.

Counsel for Wells Fargo is required to prepare amd submit a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed and a proposed judgment.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Carlito Mandia, CSR No. 9689, cmandia@sftc.org (302/EPS)
